benefits: Cadetia citrina, commonly known as the Cadetia orchid, has been studied for its potential health benefits, particularly in the areas of antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Its extracts have been shown to exhibit strong antibacterial and antifungal activities, making it a promising agent in the prevention of infections and diseases. Additionally, the plant is rich in flavonoids and other polyphenolic compounds, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. However, more research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential health benefits and its effects on human health. Further studies are necessary to confirm the efficacy and safety of Cadetia citrina as a medicinal agent.
